title: iPSC-derived neurons sample preparation for ELISA assays
steps: Cells were washed with cold PBS then lysed with 300 µL cold RIPA buffer (Thermo Fisher Scientific) supplemented with 1x of a cocktail of phosphatase and protease inhibitors (Life Technologies).
Cell lysates were transferred into 1.5ml eppendorf tubes and centrifuged for 00:05:00 at 3500rpm to remove cell debris.
Following centrifugation, the supernatant was collected and protein concentration were measured using a BCA or Bradford protein assay (Thermo Fisher Scientific).
Equal amounts of protein lysate, 20 µg , were used to perform ELISA assays according to manufacturer's instructions.
creator: Laura Mahoney-Sanchez
